prompt: Create a soft, sunlit mirror-selfie fashion portrait of a young woman named the girl next door standing in a cozy bedroom covered with anime posters. She has long, slightly messy black hair and a slim build, holding a silver smartphone in front of her face so the face is mostly hidden by the phone and a soft rectangular privacy blur. She wears a cropped anime-face graphic T-shirt, a low-waisted black-and-gray plaid micro pleated skirt, and white thigh-high socks. Use warm late-afternoon sunlight entering from the left, creating strong rectangular highlights, deep soft shadows, and a distinct shadow of her body on the wall to the right. The background is an off-white wall and door corner with exactly 9 visible anime wall decorations: 1 large poster on the far left edge, 1 smaller vertical poster below it, 1 small dark poster near the doorframe, 1 large red-and-white poster above her head, 1 dark action poster behind her head, 1 pink poster at the upper right, 1 newspaper-style manga print at mid-right, 1 large blue soccer-anime poster at lower right, and 1 partially visible colorful poster at lower left. Add elegant editorial text overlay in the upper left reading LOVED SOFTLY in large cream serif capitals, with a small hand-drawn heart and the cursive line you look like home beneath it. Add a tiny poetic caption in the lower left reading the way you exist changes everything you're not just in the story you are the story, plus a small heart below. Overall style: realistic gpt-image-2 photorealism with gentle feminine mood, nostalgic bedroom aesthetic, natural skin texture, no plastic beauty retouching, soft grain, muted warm colors, vertical 3:4 composition, intimate snapshot framing, not overly glamorous.
